title: Connected Caves
description: Adds underground villages to minecraft and underground exploration
body: Connected caves is a mod that modify the exploration by adding Underground Villages. It adds an original way to locate Underground Villages by adding magnetic spheres that tell you how many blocks away you are from a random Underground Village. It also adds magic pots for villagers and new villagers trades. The villages spawns with new loots related to the caves. If you want to find your first village, you can use the locator sphere when you spawn.
